description: REPO can only be modified by one agent at a time
TEST_ENV can only be used by one agent at a time
Neither developer should begin implementation until API spec is agreed upon
TESTER can only run tests when both FRONTEND_DEV and BACKEND_DEV implementations are ready
If a developer changes the API spec after implementation started, the other must adapt
API spec agreement must precede implementation by both developers
Both implementations must complete before TESTER can run integration tests
Both FRONTEND_DEV and BACKEND_DEV need REPO access to modify the specification
